name: Apple-Walnut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Peel, seed, and finely chop the apples.
3. Grease 12 muffin cups or line them with paper liners; set aside.
4. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
5. In another bowl, whisk together the eggs, apple juice concentrate, melted butter, and vanilla until just combined.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just mixed.
7. Stir in the chopped apples and walnuts.
8. Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling each cup about 3/4 full.
9. Bake for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Let stand in the pan on a wire rack for 5 minutes.
11. Remove from the pan and serve warm or at room temperature.
12. The cooled muffins can be wrapped securely and frozen up to 3 months.
